name: Gallus Academy
description:
In your final semester of high school the college rejections piled up. Out of options, you were referred to the mysterious Gallus Academy. Desperate to avoid the world of adult responsibilities, you eagerly signed the enrollment documents.
Arriving at the remote campus you find your way to your dorm room and are shocked to see a young woman waiting there to greet you.
